item.title: Weeom EML to PST Converter Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Weeom EML to PST Converter Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sumiirawat
item.itunes:summary:
Weeom EML to PST Converter Tool
(Utilities)
Weeom EML to PST Converter is a specialized tool designed to efficiently convert EML (Email Message Format) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. Here are its key features:
1. Bulk Conversion: Allows users to convert multiple EML files to PST format simultaneously, saving time and effort.

2. Selective Conversion: Users can choose specific EML files or folders for conversion, providing flexibility and customization.

3. Preservation of Data Integrity: Ensures that the original structure, formatting, and metadata of emails are maintained during the conversion process.

4. Compatibility: Supports various email clients that generate EML files, including Windows Live Mail, Outlook Express, Thunderbird, etc.

5. Preview Feature: Provides a preview option before conversion, allowing users to view the content of EML files to ensure accuracy.

6. No File Size Limitation: Capable of converting large-sized EML files to PST format without any file size restrictions.

7. User-Friendly Interface: Offers an intuitive and easy-to-use interface, making it accessible to both novice and advanced users.

8. Batch Processing: Supports batch conversion, enabling users to convert multiple EML files in a single operation efficiently.

9. Compatibility with Outlook Versions: Ensures compatibility with various versions of Microsoft Outlook, including Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, etc.

10. Technical Support: Provides prompt and responsive technical support to assist users with any issues or queries related to the conversion process.

Overall, Weeom EML to PST Converter is a reliable tool that simplifies the process of converting EML files to PST format while maintaining data integrity and offering convenient features for users.
[read more]
item.description:
Weeom EML to PST Converter Tool
(Utilities)
Weeom EML to PST Converter is a specialized tool designed to efficiently convert EML (Email Message Format) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. Here are its key features:
1. Bulk Conversion: Allows users to convert multiple EML files to PST format simultaneously, saving time and effort.

2. Selective Conversion: Users can choose specific EML files or folders for conversion, providing flexibility and customization.

3. Preservation of Data Integrity: Ensures that the original structure, formatting, and metadata of emails are maintained during the conversion process.

4. Compatibility: Supports various email clients that generate EML files, including Windows Live Mail, Outlook Express, Thunderbird, etc.

5. Preview Feature: Provides a preview option before conversion, allowing users to view the content of EML files to ensure accuracy.

6. No File Size Limitation: Capable of converting large-sized EML files to PST format without any file size restrictions.

7. User-Friendly Interface: Offers an intuitive and easy-to-use interface, making it accessible to both novice and advanced users.

8. Batch Processing: Supports batch conversion, enabling users to convert multiple EML files in a single operation efficiently.

9. Compatibility with Outlook Versions: Ensures compatibility with various versions of Microsoft Outlook, including Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, etc.

10. Technical Support: Provides prompt and responsive technical support to assist users with any issues or queries related to the conversion process.

Overall, Weeom EML to PST Converter is a reliable tool that simplifies the process of converting EML files to PST format while maintaining data integrity and offering convenient features for users.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Weeom EML to PST Converter Tool
(Utilities)
Weeom EML to PST Converter is a specialized tool designed to efficiently convert EML (Email Message Format) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. Here are its key features:
1. Bulk Conversion: Allows users to convert multiple EML files to PST format simultaneously, saving time and effort.

2. Selective Conversion: Users can choose specific EML files or folders for conversion, providing flexibility and customization.

3. Preservation of Data Integrity: Ensures that the original structure, formatting, and metadata of emails are maintained during the conversion process.

4. Compatibility: Supports various email clients that generate EML files, including Windows Live Mail, Outlook Express, Thunderbird, etc.

5. Preview Feature: Provides a preview option before conversion, allowing users to view the content of EML files to ensure accuracy.

6. No File Size Limitation: Capable of converting large-sized EML files to PST format without any file size restrictions.

7. User-Friendly Interface: Offers an intuitive and easy-to-use interface, making it accessible to both novice and advanced users.

8. Batch Processing: Supports batch conversion, enabling users to convert multiple EML files in a single operation efficiently.

9. Compatibility with Outlook Versions: Ensures compatibility with various versions of Microsoft Outlook, including Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, etc.

10. Technical Support: Provides prompt and responsive technical support to assist users with any issues or queries related to the conversion process.

Overall, Weeom EML to PST Converter is a reliable tool that simplifies the process of converting EML files to PST format while maintaining data integrity and offering convenient features for users.
[read more]

item.title: Windows Partition Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Windows Partition Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Windows Partition Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Windows FAT NTFS data recovery software recovers all files and folders which have been erased due to improper system shutdown, power failure, hardware faults and any human error. Windows Vista partition retrieval tool provides facility to restore all lost or deleted audio clips, videos, excel sheet, notebook and other office documents from corrupted or formatted hard disk drive. Windows partition restoration software retrieves unrecognized or inaccessible photos, pictures, images, songs and valuable data from all type of windows partition such as VFAT, FAT12, FAT16, FAT32, NTFS and NTFS5. You can recover and restore all your corrupted or damaged data completely from logically crashed or virus infected hard disk by using Windows FAT NTFS partition restoration utility. Windows file system recovery tool easily recovers lost or missed files and folders from emptied recycle bin. Windows hard disk data rescue utility is compatible with various hard drives like ATA, SCSI, IDE, EIDE and SATA. Windows Vista erased files recovery software supports all windows OS such as windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7 and Vista (Home Basic, Home Premium, Enterprise and Business).Features:* Windows partition restoration software retrieves all corrupted or deleted audio, video clips, mp3 songs and other data from formatted FAT NTFS partition.* Windows hard disk lost data rescue tool restores all files which have been erased by using SHIFT + DEL keys from keyboard.* Windows FAT NTFS file system recovery utility recovers undetectable or inaccessible data from logically corrupted or bad sector affected hard disk.* Windows Vista data retrieval software salvages missed photos, music files and jpeg, mpeg, doc, wav formats files from damaged windows FAT NTFS file systems.* Windows deleted data recovery tool is very easy to use and does not require any technical skill to install or uninstall.

[read more]
item.description:
Windows Partition Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Windows FAT NTFS data recovery software recovers all files and folders which have been erased due to improper system shutdown, power failure, hardware faults and any human error. Windows Vista partition retrieval tool provides facility to restore all lost or deleted audio clips, videos, excel sheet, notebook and other office documents from corrupted or formatted hard disk drive. Windows partition restoration software retrieves unrecognized or inaccessible photos, pictures, images, songs and valuable data from all type of windows partition such as VFAT, FAT12, FAT16, FAT32, NTFS and NTFS5. You can recover and restore all your corrupted or damaged data completely from logically crashed or virus infected hard disk by using Windows FAT NTFS partition restoration utility. Windows file system recovery tool easily recovers lost or missed files and folders from emptied recycle bin. Windows hard disk data rescue utility is compatible with various hard drives like ATA, SCSI, IDE, EIDE and SATA. Windows Vista erased files recovery software supports all windows OS such as windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7 and Vista (Home Basic, Home Premium, Enterprise and Business).Features:* Windows partition restoration software retrieves all corrupted or deleted audio, video clips, mp3 songs and other data from formatted FAT NTFS partition.* Windows hard disk lost data rescue tool restores all files which have been erased by using SHIFT + DEL keys from keyboard.* Windows FAT NTFS file system recovery utility recovers undetectable or inaccessible data from logically corrupted or bad sector affected hard disk.* Windows Vista data retrieval software salvages missed photos, music files and jpeg, mpeg, doc, wav formats files from damaged windows FAT NTFS file systems.* Windows deleted data recovery tool is very easy to use and does not require any technical skill to install or uninstall.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Windows Partition Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Windows FAT NTFS data recovery software recovers all files and folders which have been erased due to improper system shutdown, power failure, hardware faults and any human error. Windows Vista partition retrieval tool provides facility to restore all lost or deleted audio clips, videos, excel sheet, notebook and other office documents from corrupted or formatted hard disk drive. Windows partition restoration software retrieves unrecognized or inaccessible photos, pictures, images, songs and valuable data from all type of windows partition such as VFAT, FAT12, FAT16, FAT32, NTFS and NTFS5. You can recover and restore all your corrupted or damaged data completely from logically crashed or virus infected hard disk by using Windows FAT NTFS partition restoration utility. Windows file system recovery tool easily recovers lost or missed files and folders from emptied recycle bin. Windows hard disk data rescue utility is compatible with various hard drives like ATA, SCSI, IDE, EIDE and SATA. Windows Vista erased files recovery software supports all windows OS such as windows 11, windows10, windows8, windows7 and Vista (Home Basic, Home Premium, Enterprise and Business).Features:* Windows partition restoration software retrieves all corrupted or deleted audio, video clips, mp3 songs and other data from formatted FAT NTFS partition.* Windows hard disk lost data rescue tool restores all files which have been erased by using SHIFT + DEL keys from keyboard.* Windows FAT NTFS file system recovery utility recovers undetectable or inaccessible data from logically corrupted or bad sector affected hard disk.* Windows Vista data retrieval software salvages missed photos, music files and jpeg, mpeg, doc, wav formats files from damaged windows FAT NTFS file systems.* Windows deleted data recovery tool is very easy to use and does not require any technical skill to install or uninstall.

[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer EDB to PST Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer EDB to PST Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer EDB to PST Conversion
(Utilities)
ToolsBaer EDB to PST Conversion Application allows users to convert EDB files to PST files. In addition, even when the data is exported from the EDB and stored in the PST, its original directory structure is maintained. Every stage of the EDB to PST procedure is completed with an acceptable condition provided by the program's straightforward Graphical User Interface (GUI). The batch conversion method of the program allows for bulk export of EDB to PST structure. The software properly transfers all email features from an EDB file, including to, date, time, cc, bcc, from, and sent. To use this software, Microsoft Outlook does not need to be installed. EDB emails can be easily converted into PST files by users without losing email formatting, attachments, or features. Users can use the software's trial version to convert the first few emails from each folder. Users can access Exchange mailboxes in Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, and previous versions with ease with the aid of this program. You can run a program on Windows 10, 8, 7, and previous versions. As a result, you can download a trial edition for free.
Read More:- http://www.toolsbaer.com/edb-to-pst-conversion/
[read more]

[read more]

EDB emails can be easily converted into PST files by users without losing email formatting, attachments, or features. Users can use the software's trial version to convert the first few emails from each folder. item.title: Memory Card Files Undelete Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Undelete Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Company recommends you to download Memory Card Files Undelete Software that consists of advance scanning techniques and algorithms used to salvage damaged documents including images, audio, video clips from entire SD memory card in just fraction of seconds and without applying programming knowledge. Memory card salvage tool retrieves mini or micro SD card data and retrieve them at any safe PC location for future use.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Files Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Company recommends you to download Memory Card Files Undelete Software that consists of advance scanning techniques and algorithms used to salvage damaged documents including images, audio, video clips from entire SD memory card in just fraction of seconds and without applying programming knowledge. Memory card salvage tool retrieves mini or micro SD card data and retrieve them at any safe PC location for future use.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Files Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Company recommends you to download Memory Card Files Undelete Software that consists of advance scanning techniques and algorithms used to salvage damaged documents including images, audio, video clips from entire SD memory card in just fraction of seconds and without applying programming knowledge. Memory card salvage tool retrieves mini or micro SD card data and retrieve them at any safe PC location for future use.

[read more]

item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.description:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]

item.title: Digital Image Undelete Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Image Undelete Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Image Undelete Utility
(Utilities)
Digital photograph images restoration utility rescue logically or physically lost missing erased snapshot. Picture restoration software restore accidentally or intentionally damaged deleted JPEG RAW PSD PNG snaps from multimedia memory compact flash card pen zip USB thumb micro drive windows hard disk. Retrieval tool is an all-inclusive read-only and non destructive application. It supports recovery of all unreadable encrypted corrupted defective formatted images from any kind of storage media device. Application utility rescue snaps even if they are damaged due to viruses or worm infection and software or hard ware corruption. Product can retrieve data from almost all digital cameras such as Goldstar, Panasonic, Vivatar, Chinon, Kodak, Polaroid, Canon, NEC, Minalta, Fujifilm, Argus, LG, Toshiba, Rollie, Kinon, Lexar, Philips, UMAX, Olympus, Nikon etc.Features:* Digital photograph recovery utility restore photo snaps under Microsoft Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8,Windows 7.* Digital JPG BMP TIFF RAW image Restoration tool has very professional and trendy Graphical User Interface.* Application Software recover picture from all the external storage media such as compact flash memory card pen USB micro drive.* Digital photograph rescue utility retrieve PSD BGI MOV MIDI GIF snapshots from all cameras like Nikon, Philips, Mitsubishi, Canon, Minalta, HP, Ricoh, Fujifilm, Argus, NEC, Polaroid, Agfa, Rollie, LG, Panasonic, Goldstar, Vivatar, Toshiba, Kinon, Lexar, Kodak, Olympus, Chinon.* Removable media digital image retrieval software restore pictures data from storage media that is drag out directly without switching OFF the camera.

[read more]

Digital Image Undelete Utility
(Utilities)

Picture restoration software restore accidentally or intentionally damaged deleted JPEG RAW PSD PNG snaps from multimedia memory compact flash card pen zip USB thumb micro drive windows hard disk. Retrieval tool is an all-inclusive read-only and non destructive application. It supports recovery of all unreadable encrypted corrupted defective formatted images from any kind of storage media device. Application utility rescue snaps even if they are damaged due to viruses or worm infection and software or hard ware corruption. item.title: Mac USB Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac USB Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac USB Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Mac USB Drive Data Recovery Software regains missing picture, video, images from logically crashed thumb drive. Mac Data Restoration Program is easily available at www.undeletefilesmac.com website helps to retrieve accidentally deleted files and folder from formatted or re-formatted USB drive with providing facility to save all recovered data at any location on Apple PC for further usages.

[read more]
